I

informDaoToCreate() - Method in class Persistance.ShopApiDAO
This method is not required in ShopApiDAO and is not implemented.
informDaoToCreate() - Method in interface Persistance.ShopDAO
Informs the DAO to create data when the shop data storage doesn't exist.
informDaoToCreate() - Method in class Persistance.ShopJsonDAO
Is called when the shops.json doesn't exist, so it creates it and initializes the ShopJsonDAO again.
informShopDao() - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Informs the shop DAO to create its data source.
initializeCartArrays() - Method in class Business.CartManager
Initializes arrays and information needed for cart management.
insertAPriceForProduct(String, String, ArrayList<String>, ArrayList<Float>) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Validates and checks if the given price for a product is greater than the existing maximum price.
insertAProduct(String, ArrayList<String>) - Method in class Business.ShopManager
Checks if a product with the given name is already present in the list of products.
isProductInfoEmpty() - Method in class Persistance.ProductApiDAO
Checks if the product data from the API is empty.
isProductInfoEmpty() - Method in interface Persistance.ProductDAO
Checks if the JSON array representing product data is empty.
isProductInfoEmpty() - Method in class Persistance.ProductJsonDAO
Checks if the JSON array representing product data is empty.
isShopInfoEmpty() - Method in class Persistance.ShopApiDAO
Checks if shop data is present in the API.
isShopInfoEmpty() - Method in interface Persistance.ShopDAO
Checks if the storage representing shop data is empty.
isShopInfoEmpty() - Method in class Persistance.ShopJsonDAO
Checks if the JSON array representing shop data is empty.
